dates.summary: ByteDance Seed launched Seed 2.0 and introduced a Full-Duplex Speech LLM aimed at more natural real-time voice interaction, alongside a Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview release on Arena. DeepSeek cut input-cache-hit pricing across its entire API lineup to 10% of prior levels while keeping a 75% discount live for DeepSeek-V4-Pro, signaling continued price pressure in model serving. On the research side, the HGQ-LUT paper proposed faster LUT-aware training for FPGA inference, while a separate constrained-LQR paper reported near-optimal regret guarantees for safe adaptive control.
